We provide APIs that help integrate local payments and Fintech capabilities.
exclusions: As part of Rapyd's global fintech platform
borderless payments using blockchain-based digital currencies pegged to stable assets such as USD. Unlike traditional cryptocurrencies that can experience high volatility
stablecoins are designed to maintain price stability
making them well-suited for real-world payments
prevProgram.reward_range: Rapyd’s infrastructure already enables global payouts, digital wallets, local payment methods, and blockchain rails. The Stablecoin functionality further enhances how businesses can hold, transfer, and settle funds globally with improved speed, transparency, and operational efficiency.
